title: AIventure: Vibe Coding Journey
summary: AIventure is an open source retro dungeon crawler built on Angular and Phaser.js powered by Gemma 4, designed as a developer masterclass. It demonstrates vibe coding through gameplay where NPCs use an LLM to generate and execute web applications, and showcases both local model serving and cloud deployment options.
writeup: AIventure is an open source retro dungeon crawler built on Angular and Phaser.js and powered by Gemma 4, framed as a developer masterclass. Inside the gameplay, NPCs call an LLM to generate and execute web applications, illustrating vibe coding alongside agentic behaviors, tool use, prompt engineering, and model loading. The project demonstrates both local model serving and cloud deployment, so the same setup can run on a developer machine or in a hosted environment.
